jsonLd.title: DTDC is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
DTDC invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!
